name: @agentdomain/contracts
description: AgentDomain smart contracts - AgentIdentityRegistry, PaymentRouter, RenewalVault on Base

scripts.security:mythril: myth analyze src/AgentIdentityRegistry.sol --solv 0.8.24 --execution-timeout 120 && myth analyze src/PaymentRouter.sol --solv 0.8.24 --execution-timeout 120 && myth analyze src/RenewalVault.sol --solv 0.8.24 --execution-timeout 120
